title: Terms of Service
description: URCity terms of service — rules and conditions for using our website.
content:
Terms of Service

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using URCity.com, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our website.

Use of the Website

You may use URCity.com for personal, non-commercial purposes. You agree not to:

  • Use the site for any illegal purpose
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
  • Interfere with the proper working of the site
  • Copy, scrape, or redistribute our content without permission

Content and Data

All content on URCity.com is for informational purposes only. We strive for accuracy but make no guarantees. Data is sourced from public records and third-party providers and may not be current.

Data Sources: US Census Bureau, Bureau of Labor Statistics, Zillow Research, National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, Tax Foundation, and others.

Not Financial, Legal, or Tax Advice

URCity does not provide financial, legal, tax, or real estate advice. All content, including cost of living indices, housing estimates, tax calculations, and salary comparisons, is provided for general informational purposes only and should not be relied upon for personal financial, legal, or tax decisions. Always consult a qualified professional before making relocation, investment, or tax-related decisions.

Affiliate Disclosure

URCity participates in affiliate marketing programs. When you click an affiliate link and make a purchase, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. This helps us keep the site free.

Intellectual Property

All content, logos, and designs on URCity.com are the property of Northshore Press or licensed to us. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our written permission.

Disclaimer of Warranties

URCity.com is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee that:

  • The site will be available at all times
  • The information is accurate, complete, or current
  • The site is free of viruses or harmful components

Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Northshore Press and URCity shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the site, even if advised of the possibility of such damages. In no event shall our total liability exceed the amount you paid to access the site (if any) or $100, whichever is greater.

Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Northshore Press, its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses arising from your use of the site or violation of these terms.

Arbitration and Class Action Waiver

Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms of Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association. You agree to waive any right to participate in a class action lawsuit or class-wide arbitration.

Changes to Terms

We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Texas, United States, without regard to conflict of law principles.

Contact

For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@urcity.com.
